mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_metrics_daily ( metric_date, total_requests, cache_hits, similar_hits, knowledge_hits, llm_direct_count, non_legal_count, avg_latency_ms, p50_latency_ms, p95_latency_ms, total_likes, total_dislikes, avg_top_score, llm_fallback_rate, hyde_count, feedback_inaccurate, feedback_wrong_citation, feedback_irrelevant, feedback_too_vague, feedback_other ) VALUES ( #{metricDate}, #{totalRequests}, #{cacheHits}, #{similarHits}, #{knowledgeHits}, #{llmDirectCount}, #{nonLegalCount}, #{avgLatencyMs}, #{p50LatencyMs}, #{p95LatencyMs}, #{totalLikes}, #{totalDislikes}, #{avgTopScore}, #{llmFallbackRate}, #{hydeCount}, #{feedbackInaccurate}, #{feedbackWrongCitation}, #{feedbackIrrelevant}, #{feedbackTooVague}, #{feedbackOther} )

INSERT INTO rag_metrics_daily ( metric_date, total_requests, cache_hits, similar_hits, knowledge_hits, llm_direct_count, non_legal_count, avg_latency_ms, p50_latency_ms, p95_latency_ms, total_likes, total_dislikes, avg_top_score, llm_fallback_rate, hyde_count, feedback_inaccurate, feedback_wrong_citation, feedback_irrelevant, feedback_too_vague, feedback_other ) VALUES ( #{metricDate}, #{totalRequests}, #{cacheHits}, #{similarHits}, #{knowledgeHits}, #{llmDirectCount}, #{nonLegalCount}, #{avgLatencyMs}, #{p50LatencyMs}, #{p95LatencyMs}, #{totalLikes}, #{totalDislikes}, #{avgTopScore}, #{llmFallbackRate}, #{hydeCount}, #{feedbackInaccurate}, #{feedbackWrongCitation}, #{feedbackIrrelevant}, #{feedbackTooVague}, #{feedbackOther} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_requests = VALUES(total_requests), cache_hits = VALUES(cache_hits), similar_hits = VALUES(similar_hits), knowledge_hits = VALUES(knowledge_hits), llm_direct_count = VALUES(llm_direct_count), non_legal_count = VALUES(non_legal_count), avg_latency_ms = VALUES(avg_latency_ms), p50_latency_ms = VALUES(p50_latency_ms), p95_latency_ms = VALUES(p95_latency_ms), total_likes = VALUES(total_likes), total_dislikes = VALUES(total_dislikes), avg_top_score = VALUES(avg_top_score), llm_fallback_rate = VALUES(llm_fallback_rate), hyde_count = VALUES(hyde_count), feedback_inaccurate = VALUES(feedback_inaccurate), feedback_wrong_citation = VALUES(feedback_wrong_citation), feedback_irrelevant = VALUES(feedback_irrelevant), feedback_too_vague = VALUES(feedback_too_vague), feedback_other = VALUES(feedback_other), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rag_metrics_daily WHERE metric_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY metric_date ASC
